rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY LIMA VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS COMPANY et al

rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, May 9, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Berry & Berry¿s motion for order clarifying the court¿s March 15 order imposing sanctions on Keller, Fishback and Jackson is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (503/SRB)

Defendant CBS Corp.¿s motion to compel plaintiff Alma Bennett¿s amended responses and responses by Jean McCullery and Evan Bennett to defendant¿s special discovery is continued on the court¿s own motion to May 15, 2012 at 9:00 am in department 503. = (503/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Sears, Roebuck And Company
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, May 9, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the deposition of the person most qualified and custodian of records of defendant Sears, Roebuck and Co. is continued to June 26, 2012 at 9:00 am in department 503 per agreement of the parties. = (503/SRB)
